title: Respiratory Therapist
description: IQVIA is seeking a Respiratory Therapist to support our clinical research operations, assisting with respiratory function testing and patient assessments for trials evaluating pulmonary medications and devices. Working remotely, you will conduct spirometry tests, monitor patient safety, and document findings according to study protocols.
responsibilities: Conduct spirometry and pulmonary function testing per study protocols
Monitor patient vital signs and oxygen saturation during procedures
Document test results and patient responses accurately
Provide study participant education on respiratory procedures
Maintain equipment and ensure compliance with calibration standards
Collaborate with study coordinators and physicians on protocol adherence

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Respiratory Care from accredited program
skills: Patient safety and vital sign monitoring

benefits: Paid time off and employee wellness programs
